title: Umar Khalid files review petition in Supreme Court against denial of bail in Delhi Riots case
description: Umar Khalid has filed a review petition before the Supreme Court challenging the top court's order denying him bail in the 2020 Delhi Riots larger conspiracy case.The matter was mentioned before a Bench led by Justice Aravind Kumar this morning by Senior Advocate Kapil Sibal who sought an open court court hearing in the matter.The judge did not pass any direction but said he will consider.The petition by Khalid was filed through advocate N Sai Vinod. Justices Aravind Kumar and NV AnjariaThe Delh
